_comment: The 'update' rule is the load-bearing control that denies worker-identity direct pushes AND gh pr merge to main. Worker identity (daemon App installation) is NOT in bypass_actors; only the admin RepositoryRole bypasses. The pull_request rule forces the CI path (required_approving_review_count:0 is intentional — operator self-merges after CI green; the update rule, not approval count, is the boundary). required_status_checks carries the CI gate. See https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/configuring-branches-and-merges-in-your-repository/managing-rulesets/available-rules-for-rulesets#restrict-updates
name: harness-main-no-merge
